commands.review_summary:
The PR updates AWS EC2 Mac Dedicated Host selection, launch retry, stale-host orphan-sweep release behavior, docs/config, and focused Worker tests.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live AWS reproduction was run during this read-only review. Source inspection shows current main lacks capacity-aware Mac host selection, and the PR adds focused mocked tests for the reported InsufficientCapacityOnHost and stale pending-host paths.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human review should confirm the draft PR's AWS cleanup default/IAM rollout and wait for normal merge checks; no narrow ClawSweeper repair is identified.

target.title: fix(aws): harden mac host cleanup
target.body:
## Summary
- skip EC2 Mac Dedicated Hosts that AWS reports with no launch capacity
- retry auto-discovered mac host launches on another host after InsufficientCapacityOnHost while preserving explicit host pins
- release stale pending Crabbox-tagged EC2 Mac hosts from the AWS orphan sweep when enabled

## Live findings
- recent macOS failures were no longer SG rule exhaustion; they were Dedicated Host capacity/cleanup issues
- stale pending mac hosts were released manually across eu-west-1/us-east-1/us-west-2
- one eu-west-1 host remains AWS-occupied despite no active coordinator mac lease, so the controller now avoids this class where AWS exposes zero capacity

## Verification
- autoreview clean
- NODENV_VERSION=22.20.0 npm test --prefix worker -- --run test/aws.test.ts -t "EC2 Mac Dedicated Host|InsufficientCapacityOnHost|another discovered host|explicit macOS host pin"
- NODENV_VERSION=22.20.0 npm test --prefix worker -- --run test/fleet.test.ts -t "orphan sweep|EC2 Mac Dedicated Hosts|missing instance"
- NODENV_VERSION=22.20.0 npm run lint --prefix worker
- NODENV_VERSION=22.20.0 npm run check --prefix worker
- NODENV_VERSION=22.20.0 npm run format:check --prefix worker
- git diff --check
